rationale.R1.6: The delegation 'Polish this' is an unambiguous prose-quality request. The artifact exhibits compounding problems — cascading redundant hedges ('may potentially', 'could possibly', 'we believe'), verbatim repetition of the phrase 'which we believe reflects a modest improvement over the baseline' across three consecutive paragraphs, and inflated sentence length — all of which fall squarely within sentence/paragraph quality work.
